Comment: inspect data mode override and area3 approved payload

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc '
python3 - <<"PY"
import json, boto3
s3 = boto3.client("s3", region_name="ap-southeast-1")
bucket = "bkk-election-images-prod"
keys = [
    "api-data/score/monitor/overrides/data-mode.json",
    "api-data/score/indexes/by-area/default/3/submissions.json",
]
for key in keys:
    try:
        obj = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)
        body = json.loads(obj["Body"].read().decode())
        print("KEY=" + key)
        print(json.dumps(body, ensure_ascii=False).encode("ascii","backslashreplace").decode())
    except Exception as exc:
        print("KEY=" + key)
        print("ERR=" + str(exc).encode("ascii","backslashreplace").decode())
PY'
